title: Aroused by Gymnopedies
original_title: ジムノペディに乱れる
overview: Shinji is a middle-aged, sleaze film director who used to be famous. He hardly goes back home and moves from one woman to another. In spite of his idleness, women are very fond of him and look after him compassionately for whatever reason.
